fallback.title: Your Identity, Simplified.
fallback.para1: Get a memorable 2nd number on your existing SIM.
fallback.para2: Show your #TAG, not your orginal mobile number on NameTAG calls.

slides.title: NameTAG
slides.para2: Show your name, not your number, when making calls.
slides.description: With NameTAG, your phone number transforms into a unique, memorable name that reflects who you are. Whether you're an individual or a business, this lets you display your chosen name instead of a standard number when making calls—making every interaction more personal, professional, and easy to remember.

slides.title: NameTAG
slides.para2: Use a custom name for your customers calls to reflect your brand.
slides.description: NameTAG helps you strengthen your brand presence by replacing your regular phone number with a custom NameTAG. Perfect for businesses and influencers, this service allows customers and contacts to recognize and remember you instantly—helping to build trust, brand loyalty, and better communication experiences.

slides.title: NameTAG
slides.para2: Create a catchy NameTAG linked to your number.
slides.description: Stand out in every call with a NameTAG—your personalized calling identity. Whether it's a nickname, brand name, or phrase, NameTAG links your selected name to your real number, ensuring that whoever you contact sees your identity first. It's simple to set up, easy to manage, and available for both prepaid and postpaid users.

items.label: As per package plan of your primary number

what.label: What is NameTAG?
what.title: A Virtual Number for Your Real Identity
what.sub: NameTAG lets you get a short, catchy number (2–8 chars) mapped to your existing Ethio SIM.
what.bulletBody: Designed for instant recognition, easier sharing, and a stronger personal or brand identity.
bullets: Dial Calls to Other's #TAGs and Mobile number with call charges as per your package plan

featuresSection.label: Platform Features
featuresSection.title: Everything You Need to Manage Your Identity

items.title: Real-Time Assignment
items.description: Instant NameTAG registration and activation with live availability check.

items.title: Fayda KYC Verification
items.description: Secure identity verification via Ethiopia's National ID system for Individual Customers.

items.title: Call PIN Security
items.description: Optional PIN for incoming calls so only approved callers can reach your #TAG.

items.title: Call Scheduling
items.description: Set active hours for your #TAG and manage when calls can reach you.

items.title: Multi-Language Support
items.description: English, Amharic, Oromo, Somali, and Tigrinya for inclusive access.

items.title: Customer Dashboard
items.description: NameTAG Dashboard for customers to manage the Account and #TAGs

items.title: Multi-Channel Access
items.description: Manage via Web Portal, Mobile App. And USSD *883# for an individaul customers.

items.title: Flexible Billing for Corprotes
items.description: Monthly, Quarterly, Semi-Annual, and Annual plans with telebirr.

items.title: Monthly Billing for Individuals
items.description: Monthly plan for individual customer with telebirr and Ethio Airtime charging.

steps.title: Create Account
steps.desc: Register at nametag.et or via the Mobile App. Choose individual or corporate account type.

steps.title: Choose Your TAG
steps.desc: Search and pick your NameTAG across Platinum, Golden, Silver, or Bronze tiers.

steps.title: Pay & Activate
steps.desc: Pay via telebirr or Ethio Airtime. Your #TAG is instantly active on your SIM after verification.

steps.title: Start Calling
steps.desc: Dial with # prefix before any number. The receiver sees your #TAG  as CLI.

items.q: Does my original number stay private?
items.a: Yes. When you call via NameTAG, receivers only see your TAG. Your primary MSISDN can be disclosed by platform SMS for transparency.

items.q: Can I block someone from calling my NameTAG?
items.a: Yes. Use web/app tools or SMS commands to block and unblock users and maintain your whitelist.

items.q: What if I change my SIM or mobile number?
items.a: NameTAG supports number migration after verification so your identity can stay with you.
Corporate accounts can manage multiple TAGs and assign them per team, branch, or campaign.

items.q: Can I block someone from calling NameTag?
items.a: Yes. You can manage blocked callers from your portal, app, or supported SMS commands at any time.

items.q: How do I register my NameTAG?
items.a: You can register from the web portal, mobile app, or USSD *883# after availability and identity verification.

items.q: Can I use my NameTAG for business branding?
items.a: Yes. Business users can create branded tags and configure welcome prompt, routing, and identity settings.
You can pay using telebirr Super App, partner channels, or Ethio airtime based on your subscription plan.

items.q: Can I transfer my NameTAG to another number?
items.a: Transfer and migration are supported after verification and eligibility checks defined by the platform policy.

items.q: Is NameTAG available in multiple languages?
items.a: Yes. The service supports multiple languages including English, Amharic, Afaan Oromo, Somali, and Tigrinya.

cta.title: Be More Than a Number.
cta.sub: Register your NameTAG at www.nametag.et or dial *883# today.

footer.tagline: Ethiopia's first caller identity platform, transforming how people see you when you call, from long numbers to a short #TAG that truly represents you.
